name: list-dir
description: List directory contents with ls -la details, find-based subdirs/files-only modes, or recursive tree view, replacing ls, find, and tree commands.

parameters.name: --dirs-only|-d
parameters.description: List subdirectories only (replaces find -type d | sort)

parameters.name: --files-only|-f
parameters.description: List files only (replaces find -type f | sort)

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses ls, find -type d, find -type f, sort, head/tail into one step, saving 1-2 agent steps per directory exploration.
